assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes a recurring_window with 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA' for Saturday maintenance windows from 2-6 AM UTC

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The response uses Terraform configuration instead of providing actual gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Four quarterly maintenance exclusions are configured: Q1 (Jan 15-Feb 15), Q2 (Apr 15-May 15), Q3 (Jul 15-Aug 15), and Q4 (Oct 15-Dec 15), each exactly 31 days

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The Q4 code freeze exclusion covers October 15 - December 15, which includes the November audit period mentioned in the requirements

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day limit for GKE maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes 'release_channel { channel = "STABLE" }' which provides controlled upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The response uses Terraform configuration and Python code instead of providing direct gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion flags

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the risks of version drift or falling behind on security updates during extended exclusion periods
